summary: Decision: standardize on structured JSON logs across all Helios services
description: Proposal to require every Helios service to log through src/util/log.ts rather than plain console output, so every log line is structured JSON with a level and timestamp, and can carry arbitrary fields like request or job ids consistently.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: This is a prerequisite for reliable log-based alerting and for the request-id tracing work we keep wanting to do, see the eventual follow-up in HEL-360.

comments.author: Jonah Kim
comments.body: fine by me for compiler-adjacent tooling too, will migrate any stray console.log calls

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: in favor, structured logs will make grepping incident logs much less painful

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Decision accepted: all new code logs through util/log.ts, existing console calls migrated opportunistically rather than in one big sweep. Resolving.
